changes: Added a Swahili explanation of what an API is, including endpoint, request, response and JSON context.
Added production caution about tokens, browser exposure, rate limits, billing, privacy, errors and endpoint status.
Added a local developer tools bridge for JSON, JWT, Base64, UUID, Regex and SQL browser utilities.
Added a short glossary for endpoint, request, response, JSON, token/API key, rate limit, webhook and SDK.
Kept /api/docs/ and /api/pricing as explicit English-only source-of-truth links.
